text.p: I should thank you for all the things you done (american english) for me especially for taking up the responsibility to care for my house in thank you very much.

I was on board the plane by the time you called and the cell was off at the time. The return journey was safe and easy I am home taking one more day off and then back to the grind on 11/22/06. I just spoke with my boss who admitted missing me so much he couldn't wait to see me back to work tomorrow.
I enjoyed my visit so much infact I am looking forward to yet another one in not too distant future God willing.
While in , , and I tried to reconcile and with hope that they will continue with thier friendship in sha Allah. I intend to check on them from time to time inshaAllah.
how is your daughter hope she is doing ok, I am sorry I didn't see her before I left but I wish her well. Please extend my appreciation to your wiife and my prayer is with both of you.
I had the opportunity to speak with your dad he is very proud of you, I am proud of you too, I wish you all the best.
once again thank you for everything, God bless you.
